case_title: ROSARIO ROA VS. ENMA JOSEFINA FUENTES et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-07-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED BY MAIL, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROA, ROSARIO SERVED DEC-18-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, ENMA JOSEFINA
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAY-12-2014. MAR-12-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNABLE TO PROCESS DEFENDANT(S) REJECTION OF PROPOSED ARBITRATOR CAROL LEE HEALY. RECEIVED UNTIMELY.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROA, ROSARIO AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, ENMA JOSEFINA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-12-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-09-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-18-2014
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROA, ROSARIO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT FUENTES, ENMA JOSEFINA
ARBITRATOR CAROL LEE HEALEY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAY-23-2014 THROUGH AUG-21-2014.

PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DEBRA FINK BOGAARDS.
